holdings.n: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation

holdings.infoBox: AQLG is an equity ETF with a total of 131 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 5.13%, Alphabet at 5.05%, First Horizon at 3.88%, iShares Core S&P 500 ETF at 3.66%, and Citigroup at 3.58%.

overview.description: The HCM Large Cap Growth ETF (AQLG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in large-cap US growth companies. The fund identifies attractive securities and sectors through a multi-factor model that uses fundamental and technical data. AQLG was launched on Jun 8, 2026 and is issued by HCM.
